core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Cyberpunk aesthetics.
Emotion First: Trading is adrenaline. The UI must feel 'live' and 'electric'.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Charts and numbers must pop against the dark void.
Zoom In: Focus on the tick-by-tick movements.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to separate dense data clusters.
Contrast: Neon signals against Deep Obsidian backgrounds.
anti_patterns: No Flat Gray Cards. Use Glassmorphism and layered depth.

rules: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data (prices, tickers, percentages).
Use 'Inter' for long-form text and UI labels.
Background is Deep Obsidian (#050A14), not pure black.
Primary Color (#00F0FF) is for 'Active' states and key CTAs only.
Borders are subtle (1px, 8% opacity white) unless hovered.

glassmorphism.card: bg-card/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

borders.tracing_beam: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:p-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-primary/50 before:to-transparent before:animate-border-trace

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6 p-4 md:p-6

Button.styles: rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] uppercase tracking-wider font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] transition-all

variants.glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/20 text-white

Card.styles: rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative group

Input.styles: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder:text-white/30

rules: Use CSS transitions for hover states (color, border, shadow).

3d_strategy.hero_elements: Use 'react-three-fiber' for floating 3D coins or abstract data cubes in the hero section.
3d_strategy.charts: Use 'recharts' but style them with gradients and glow effects (drop-shadow) to mimic 3D depth.
3d_strategy.interactive_globe: Use 'react-globe.gl' for global market visualization if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Implement the 'glass-card' and 'glass-panel' utility classes in index.css.
3. Refactor the Sidebar and Navbar to use the 'Deep Obsidian' glass aesthetic.
4. For the Dashboard, strictly follow the 'Bento Grid' layout.
5. Ensure all charts have a neon glow effect.
7. DO NOT use generic white backgrounds. Everything is dark mode by default.
universal_guidelines: No 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic centered layouts, flat gradients).
Create depth with z-index and layering.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use tinted blacks.
